prompt: Add local IPv4 host routes for interfaces
note: RM now creates a Direct /32 local host route with next hop 127.0.0.1 for every active interface IPv4 address, alongside the connected network route; native /32 addresses are deduplicated
decisions: Keep the RIB host route associated with the original configured interface to match VRP display ip routing-table semantics
